---
title: "Emily Seymour, Countess of Hertfor"
---

## Emily Seymour, Countess of Hertfor

**Dates:** (1816-1902)

**Maiden name:** (Murray)

### Description

supporter of the Mothers’ Union

### Biography

She married (1839) the 5th Marquess of Hertford (1812-1884), who succeeded his notoriously dissolute cousin in 1870.  As a recent widow, she was an early and enthusiastic supporter of the Mothers’ Union.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 21 [1899]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
